word: H243 - אַזְנֹות תָּבֹור - ʼAznôwth Tâbôwr - az-noth' taw-bore' - Aznoth-tabor

sections.paragraph:
Original: אזנות תּבור

Transliteration: 'aznôth tâbôr

Phonetic: az-noth' taw-bore'

BDB Definition:

Aznoth Tabor = "peaks of Tabor"
  1. a pair of hills on Naphtali's border

Origin: from H238 and H8396

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
